title: Fast-Food Menu Illustrator Design
brief: I need a sharp, modern menu designed in Adobe Illustrator for a fast-food restaurant. We already have a full brand style guide, so the colors, fonts, and overall layout imagery from that guide must come through clearly in the final piece. Scope • Design a clean, eye-catching menu that organizes items, descriptions, and prices in a way that is easy to read at a glance. • Reflect our fast-food vibe while staying 100 % on brand—use the specified color palette, typography, and visual hierarchy from our guide. • Prepare both an editable .AI file for future updates and a press-ready PDF for immediate printing. What I’m looking for You’re comfortable in Adobe Illustrator and have an eye for typography, spacing, and hierarchy. Past work creating restaurant menus, brochures, or other print collateral will stand out. Accuracy and attention to detail matter; I don’t want to hunt for missing fonts or relink images later. Deliverables • Editable Adobe Illustrator (.AI) source • Print-ready PDF (CMYK, bleed, trim marks) • Folder with any custom fonts and linked assets Please attach or link to two or three recent menu or restaurant-related designs so I can quickly gauge fit. Excited to collaborate and get this menu off to the printers soon!
